zh.lifeSummary: Emma De Stapleford是Robert Bruen Stapleford的女兒，於1260年出生在英國英格蘭爾布盧 斯塔普利福德。她和Baron Roger Brienne至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1321年在英國賀特福爾洛金享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleford (Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Essex, Hertfordshire, Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, Wiltshire), all named with Old English stapol ‘post, pillar’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Emma De Stapleford was born in 1260, in Bruen Stapleford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Bruen Stapleford. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Baron Roger Brienne. She died in 1321, in Throcking, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 61.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma De Staplefordは1260年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブルン スタプレフォードでRobert Bruen Staplefordの娘として生まれた。彼女はBaron Roger Brienneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1321年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスロクイングで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma De Stapleford(은)는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브룬 스타플레퍼드에서 Robert Bruen Stapleford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Baron Roger Brienne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1321년 영국 허트퍼드실르 스록잉에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Emma De Stapleford родилась в 1260 г. в местности бруен стаплефорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert Bruen Stapleford. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Baron Roger Brienne. Она умерла в 1321 г. в местности троккинг, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.
